title: The Empire Strikes Back Monthly
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}} {{MagazineSeries |image=[[File:TESBMonthly140.jpg]] |title=''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' |publisher=[[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]] |start date=[[November]], [[1980]][[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 140|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 140]] |end date=[[June]], [[1982]][[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 158|''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly'' 158]] |genre= |issues=19 }} '''''The Empire Strikes Back Monthly''''' was the third iteration of [https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marvel_UK Marvel UK]’s ''[[Star Wars]]'' comic, which continued both strips and the numbering system of previous incarnation, ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly]]''. The series continued to reprint stories from [[Marvel Comics]]' American ''Star Wars'' series, along with several other strips to help bulk out its larger pagination. After 19 monthly editions, with #159 the publication retitled itself to simply ''[[Star Wars Monthly]]''. ==Story breakdown== A list of the issues of the series, and the US Marvel Comics stories they reprint:
  1. [[Star Wars (1977) 45|''Star Wars'' 45]]
  2. [[Star Wars (1977) 46|''Star Wars'' 46]]
  3. [[Star Wars (1977) 47|''Star Wars'' 47]]
  4. [[Star Wars (1977) 53|''Star Wars'' 53]]
  5. [[Star Wars (1977) 54|''Star Wars'' 54]]
    6. *145-146: [[Star Wars (1977) 49|''Star Wars'' 49]]
  6. [[Star Wars (1977) 51|''Star Wars'' 51]]
  7. [[Star Wars (1977) 52|''Star Wars'' 52]]
  8. [[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly 149|''Death-Masque'']] (reprinted in ''Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1'')
  9. [[Star Wars (1977) 16|''Star Wars'' 16]]
  10. ''[[The Pandora Effect]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' and ''Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1'')
  11. [[Star Wars (1977) 55|''Star Wars'' 55]]
  12. ''[[Dark Knight's Devilry]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds '' and ''Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1'')
  13. ''[[Tilotny Throws a Shape]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' and ''Star Wars Omnibus: Wild Space Volume 1'') and half of [[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' 56]]
  14. ''[[Dark Lord's Conscience]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'') and half of [[Star Wars (1977) 56|''Star Wars'' 56]]
  15. ''[[Rust Never Sleeps]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'') and half of [[Star Wars (1977) 57|''Star Wars'' 57]]
  16. ''[[The Flight of the Falcon]]'' (reprinted in ''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'') and half of [[Star Wars (1977) 57|''Star Wars'' 57]]
  17. [[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' 58]]
